history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with short, dark, slightly tousled hair and clear, bright eyes gazes directly at the viewer with a gentle, almost shy smile. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a V-neck collar. On the left side of his chest, the word "AUROCEAN" is printed in small white capital letters. To the right of this text, there is a circular logo with "AUROCEAN" and "2000" around a stylized image. A large white number "5" is prominently displayed on the lower right side of the t-shirt.

The man is positioned in the foreground, slightly off-center to the right. Behind him, to his left, is a wooden shelf unit with illuminated shelves. On the top shelf, there are several decorative glass bottles, one of which is a vibrant green, and a small ornate golden frame. Below that, on another shelf, are several white, ornate decorative objects that resemble stylized mushrooms or fungi.

The background behind the man features a large, vintage-style poster or tapestry with sepia-toned illustrations. The illustrations depict various modes of early air travel and sailing vessels. Prominently featured are two large hot air balloons, one with a basket and intricate detailing, and another appearing simpler. To the right of the balloons, there is an illustration of a ship with multiple sails and balloons. The poster has a slightly aged, textured appearance.

The overall lighting is warm and soft, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by the dark black of the t-shirt, the warm browns of the wooden shelves and background, and the muted sepia tones of the poster. The green bottle provides a subtle pop of color. The mood is serene, youthful, and slightly nostalgic due to the vintage poster and decorative items. The image has a soft focus, giving it a slightly dreamy or ethereal quality.
